inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net loss $31.1M divided by 83.2M weighted-average diluted shares; operating cash flow used $18.9M
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: Stockholders equity $23.3M at 2025-12-31 / shares; 46,000-acre land and 220-mile pipeline carried at historical cost — not fair-value NAV
inputs.cash_source: Cash $8.6M at 2025-12-31 / 83.2M shares; Q1 2026 $16.5M after equity raises
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence stress path uses filing net loss per share. Primary stance gate is yield-curve payoff on Mojave Groundwater Bank catalyst, not ten-year cash flow on negative owner cash.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: Cash ~$0.20/sh at FY2025 year-end vs ~$86M debt; GAAP book not a dhando floor
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] Probability-weighted Mojave Bank contracted supply (21,275 AFY) + pipeline/land floor; see nav_overlay
optionality_gate.notes: Pre-revenue on core water bank; ATEC filter sales are operating but do not fund $1.25-1.5B buildout alone

nav_overlay.overlay_rationale: Book understates permitted water supply (2.5M AF), 46,000 acres, and Northern Pipeline; overlay sizes contracted 21,275 AFY supply path and MWI equity option — not full 50,000 AFY ramp.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025 Item 1: land and pipelines at cost; Mojave Groundwater Bank permits sustained 2014/2016

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Binding $400M private-equity commitment to MWI (currently due diligence only)
Northern Pipeline conversion in-service date and throughput above 20,000-23,000 AFY
Lytton Credit Agreement draw timing and Storage Cash Flows Right conversion
Southern Pipeline Arizona routing and EPCOR marketing termination impact
RIC hydrogen lease escalation beyond $35,000/year development phase

segments_or_options.label: Mojave Groundwater Bank — 21,275 AFY contracted supply
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: 21,275 AFY × $850/AF net ≈ $18M/year gross at wellhead; 45% probability of partial ramp by year 7 [Assumption]
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 Item 1: 2024 supply agreements; FEIR permits 50,000 AFY

segments_or_options.label: MWI equity + pipeline reimbursement at financing close
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: Upfront reimbursement + minority MWI equity on $451M target equity plan [Assumption]
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025: MWI formed Dec 2024; Lytton Credit Agreement Oct 2025 up to $51M

segments_or_options.label: 220-mile Northern Pipeline (idle, conversion permitted)
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025: acquired 2021; FVWA 2nd Addendum Sep 2025 for water conversion

segments_or_options.label: ATEC water treatment filter sales
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2025 Water Treatment segment revenue $14.5M; 441 filters shipped

segments_or_options.label: Up to 1M AF groundwater storage / banking fees
segments_or_options.base_terminal_rationale: No storage contracts signed; discussions only — explicit zero in overlay base after scan
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025: banking capacity permitted; no executed storage agreements

segments_or_options.label: RIC Energy hydrogen lease (3,000 acres Cadiz Ranch)
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025: $35k/year development lease; $1,000/acre if construction approved

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Water and Land Resources segment assets $130.9M at cost vs permitted 2.5M AF supply and 46,000 acres

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: Mojave aquifer; 21,275 AFY contracted of 50,000 AFY permit; Northern/Southern pipeline routes

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Corporate G&A and development spend burden consolidated path; Water Treatment profitable at revenue level

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: 21,275 AFY supply agreements subject to financial/regulatory conditions precedent

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: MWI not yet capitalized; no mark on unconsolidated stake

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dividend; prior litigation on permits resolved 2014/2016

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: ATEC filter growth in segment revenue; Mojave water not yet in run-rate

bear.notes: MWI financing fails; continued dilution and debt service; ATEC-only stub

base.notes: Partial Northern Pipeline conversion; MWI first-close with Lytton + partial PE; ~20k AFY initial deliveries

lines.label: MWI reimbursement + equity
lines.math: Milestone on $451M equity plan first close [Assumption]

lines.label: Pipeline and land floor
lines.math: Northern Pipeline conversion permitted; land at cost on BS

lines.label: Debt and dilution drag
lines.math: Net $78M debt and ongoing equity issuance reduce per-share payoff

bull.notes: Full MWI capitalization; 25k+ AFY throughput; storage contracts; RIC hydrogen ramp

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Mojave Groundwater Bank initial deliveries via converted Northern Pipeline after MWI equity close; ATEC filter volume as secondary operating ramp
growth_explanation.bear_change: Financing and regulatory conditions precedent not satisfied; losses persist
growth_explanation.bull_change: Full 50,000 AFY permit utilization plus storage banking fees

catalyst_paths.impact: Partial Northern Pipeline conversion; MWI first-close with Lytton + partial PE; ~20k AFY initial deliveries
MWI financing fails; continued dilution and debt service; ATEC-only stub

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
